description:
Umbrella epic for the Tier 2 work from `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` practical backlog summary.

Use this epic when targeting the follow-on OM improvements that build on the Tier 1 foundation:
- current-task / suggested-response lifecycle refinement
- gap markers and session-phase organization
- reflection robustness and retry/fallback behavior

This subtree remains blocked behind Tier 1 completion and is also intentionally serialized to keep delegation practical and low-conflict.
title: Tier 2 follow-on stream for practical Mastra-parity OM improvements
